de.description: Improved emotion detection for German — now with native GermEval data
de.changelog: v2: xlm-roberta-base + GermEval (10K native DE), F1=0.447, 69% top-1, 15/28 perfect, only 1 missed emotion

ja.description: Improved emotion detection for Japanese — now with WRIME v1+v2 native data
ja.changelog: v2: xlm-roberta-base + WRIME v1+v2 (35K native JA), F1=0.396, 8/8 sanity, 56% top-1

history.changelog: xlm-roberta-base + WRIME native data, F1=0.376, 8/8 sanity, 56% top-1 accuracy

ko.description: Improved emotion detection for Korean — retrained with early stopping
ko.changelog: v2: xlm-roberta-base + KOTE (50K native KO), early stopping epoch 6, F1=0.568 (training), 8/8 sanity, 68% top-1, 81% top-3

history.changelog: xlm-roberta-base + KOTE (50K native KO) + NLLB translations, F1=0.379, 8/8 sanity, 67% top-1, 83% top-3
